stage_identity.evidence: Byte maintains teen-stage gangly proportions with big expressive eyes and smooth pixel-art contours. Silhouette matches canonical teen form.

pixel_style.evidence: Clean 2D pixel art with dithered shading preserved. Readable silhouette maintained. No photorealistic drift.

requested_changes_visible.evidence: Evening lighting transition visible with warmer, slightly dimmer tones compared to afternoon. Byte in patient waiting posture with chin resting on hands, gazing toward laptop with ecstatic expression.

artifact_free.evidence: No garbled text, floating glyphs, malformed anatomy, duplicated parts, or smeared objects visible. Clean pixel edges throughout.

prop_layout_integrity.evidence: Exactly one golden 10-day trophy positioned on left side of shelf. Exactly one green plant friend positioned on right side of shelf with clear spacing between. One food bowl on floor to right of desk with proper spacing from desk legs. All props single-instance.

anchors_present.evidence: Desk present with centered oversized laptop. Chicago skyline visible through window behind. All three anchor elements clearly visible and properly positioned.

temporal_mood_match.evidence: Warm evening light transitioning from afternoon golden tones matches temporal state (9:12 PM Chicago). Ecstatic mood reflected in Byte's happy expression and bright palette. 6.74 hours since last commit appropriately reflected in patient waiting pose.

reground_cleanup.evidence: Mode is normal (not reground). Check not applicable.
